nodes.label: दोस्त की पोशाक
nodes.description: A story about friendship, appearance, and true respect

nodes.label: पात्र (Characters)
nodes.description: The main characters in the story

nodes.label: दोस्त (The Friend)
nodes.description: The wise friend who teaches a lesson about judging by appearances

nodes.label: मेज़बान और मेहमान
nodes.description: The host and guests at the feast who judge the friend by his clothes

nodes.label: कहानी का क्रम (Story Sequence)
nodes.description: The main events of the story in order

nodes.label: पहली बार (First Visit)
nodes.description: Friend comes in simple clothes and is disrespected

nodes.label: दूसरी बार (Second Visit)
nodes.description: Same friend comes in fine clothes and receives great respect

nodes.label: कहानी का मोड़ (The Twist)
nodes.description: Friend puts food on his clothes, saying 'You respect my clothes, not me!'

nodes.label: मुख्य विषय (Themes)
nodes.description: The important messages and themes of the story

nodes.label: सच्चा सम्मान (True Respect)
nodes.description: Real respect is for the person, not for their clothes or wealth

nodes.label: सच्ची दोस्ती (True Friendship)
nodes.description: True friendship accepts a person as they are, beyond appearances

nodes.label: भाषा सीखना (Language Learning)
nodes.description: New words: पोशाक, सम्मान, अपमान, दिखावा, गुण, सादगी

nodes.label: विलोम शब्द (Opposites)
nodes.description: सम्मान ↔ अपमान, सादा ↔ भड़कीला, सच्चा ↔ नकली

nodes.label: सीख (Moral)
nodes.description: Do not judge people by their appearance - a person's true value lies in their character and qualities
